nasb.text: Then he is to bring out the bull to a place outside the camp and burn it as he burned the first bull; it is the sin offering for the assembly.

esv.text: And he shall carry the bull outside the camp and burn it up as he burned the first bull; it is the sin offering for the assembly.

cnv.text: 他要把這公牛搬到營外焚燒，好像焚燒前一頭公牛一樣，這是會眾的贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 他要把这公牛犊剩下的部分拿到营外焚烧，像焚烧前一头公牛犊一样。这是为全体会众所献的赎罪祭。
